title: for...of
subtitle: Iterate over array values
goal: Learn to iterate over every element in an array using a for...of loop.
explanation: for...of iterates over the values in an array.
On each iteration, you receive one element.
You do not need to work with indexes.
It is one of the simplest ways to iterate over an array.
for...of is often used to display or process data.

analogy.title: Analogy
analogy.text: Imagine a basket of fruit. You take one fruit, then the next, and then another until you have looked at all of them.

remember: You do not need to use indexes.

mistake.title: Common mistake
mistake.text: Beginners sometimes expect to receive an index. for...of returns the values themselves, not their positions.

quiz.question: What does for...of provide when used with an array?
